examples: Today, in the math class, I had the urge to fart.
Animals produce methane, which is another dangerous greenhouse gas when they burp and fart.
Every night he listens to my troubles, cooing his understanding or praising me with an encouraging fart.
So yes apple has the most apps but how many fart apps do you really need.
An old Dormobile van, painted with flowers and with a fart-ing exhaust, dropped them off in the drive.
